title: jurinea micevskii
intro: Jurinea micevskii, a perennial plant species in the family Asteraceae, is native to Central Asia and is also known as the Micevskii's jurinea or Micevsky's fleabane. The plant contains flavonoids and sesquiterpenes, which are responsible for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Jurinea micevskii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Jurinea micevskii can be prepared for medicinal use through various herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
